nodes.name: Beef & Veggie Stew — Mild-Spice Bake
nodes.description: name: Beef & Veggie Stew — Mild-Spice Bake | short_description: Beef and veggie stew inspired by a mild-spice bake, featuring tender stew beef with potatoes, carrots, and celery simmered in savory bro
nodes.premise: Meal: Beef & Veggie Stew — Mild-Spice Bake - name: Beef & Veggie Stew — Mild-Spice Bake | short_description: Beef and veggie stew inspired by a mild-spice bake, featuring tender stew beef with potatoes, carrots, and celery simmered in savory broth. | meal_suggestion: Serve hot in bowls with a side of steamed greens or a simple salad, and optional crusty whole-grain bread. Garnish with fresh herbs (e.g., parsley) for added flavor without extra calories. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich beef provides essential amino acids; potatoes add energy-rich carbohydrates; carrots and celery supply fiber, vitamins, and minerals; broth contributes moisture and minerals. Sodium varies with broth type; to keep sodium lower, use a low-sodium broth and trim visible fat from the beef.

nodes.name: Shrimp Fried Rice — Citrus Fresh Set
nodes.description: name: Shrimp Fried Rice — Citrus Fresh Set | short_description: Shrimp fried rice with peas, carrots, egg, and soy sauce—a quick, protein-rich grain dish with vegetables. | meal_suggestion: Serve as a
nodes.premise: Meal: Shrimp Fried Rice — Citrus Fresh Set - name: Shrimp Fried Rice — Citrus Fresh Set | short_description: Shrimp fried rice with peas, carrots, egg, and soy sauce—a quick, protein-rich grain dish with vegetables. | meal_suggestion: Serve as a balanced plate: about 1 cup cooked rice with 4–6 oz shrimp and a generous portion of peas and carrots. To reduce sodium, use low-sodium soy sauce or tamari; substitute white rice with brown rice for more fiber. Pair with a citrus side to emphasize the Citrus Fresh Set. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich from shrimp and egg; carbohydrates from rice; fiber from peas and carrots. Moderate to high sodium from soy sauce; consider low-sodium soy sauce or limiting portion. The Citrus Fresh Set can add vitamin C if paired with a citrus beverage or garnish.

nodes.description: name: Shrimp Fried Rice — Garlic-Ginger Bowl | short_description: Garlic-ginger shrimp fried rice bowl with peas, carrots, and egg—protein and starch in a quick, savory dish; mindful of sodium and she
nodes.premise: Meal: Shrimp Fried Rice — Garlic-Ginger Bowl - name: Shrimp Fried Rice — Garlic-Ginger Bowl | short_description: Garlic-ginger shrimp fried rice bowl with peas, carrots, and egg—protein and starch in a quick, savory dish; mindful of sodium and shellfish allergen. | meal_suggestion: To boost fiber and reduce sodium: use brown rice or cauliflower rice; choose a low-sodium soy sauce; add more vegetables (peppers, broccoli); reduce oil and use a small amount of sesame oil for flavor. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich due to shrimp and egg; includes carbs from rice and fiber from peas and carrots; may be high in sodium from soy sauce; shellfish allergen present; cooking oil adds fat; can be made lower-sodium and higher-fiber with substitutions.
